case_title: DEMAREE, VERLA L. vs. MCCARTNEY, JOHN et al

9:44AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. COURT CONVENES FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES, 12 JURORS & 1 ALTERNATE PRESENT. DEFENSE CASE CONTINUES. ORAL EVIDENCE GIVEN. DEFENSE RESTS. CLOSING STATEMENTS BY PLAINTIFF & DEFENSE. FINAL CLOSING STATEMENTS BY PLAINTIFF. JURY INSTRUCTED ON THE LAW & RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. JURY REACHED SPECIAL VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. JURY POLLED - UNANIMOUS. SPECIAL VERDICT RECORDED BY THE CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF DEMAREE, VERLA L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2010 PALOU AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, COSTS PER COST BILL

9:00AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. COURT CONVENES FOR CONT'D JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES, 12 JURORS & 1 ALTERNATE PRESENT. PLTF BEGINS CASE, ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE ALSO GIVEN BY DEFENSE. PLTF'S PRAYER. PLTF RESTS. DEFENSE BEGINS CASE, ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. COURT ADJOURNED UNTIL 9:00AM 10/7/94.

1:30PM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. FORTY-ONE PROSPECTIVE JURORS ASSIGNED FOR VOIR DIRE GIVEN OATH AND AFFIRMATION. PROSPECTIVE JURORS VOIR DIRED BY THE COURT, PLAINTIFF & DEFENSE. PEREMPTORILY CHALLENGES AND FOR CAUSE EXECUTED. TWELVE JURORS AND TWO ALTERNATES SWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE. COURT ADJOURNED UNTIL 8:30AM 10/6/94. DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE - DENIED OUT OF PRESENCE OF THE JURY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF DEMAREE, VERLA L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2010 PALOU AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, COSTS PER COST BILL
